name: Brian Babin
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $154,742 for Brian Babin in U.S. House, TX-36. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
